rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks for component ports must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Assumptions and guarantees for ports should reference visible feature names or named constants
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers and named constants when defining range constraints in AGREE contracts
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Define range checks using boolean expressions like 'x >= min and x <= max'
Place annex agree blocks in appropriate AADL scopes: type for component contracts, implementation for subcomponent bindings
anti_patterns: Avoid placing port-based assumptions in implementation scopes unless referencing subcomponent ports
Do not mix incompatible types in AGREE helper declarations (e.g., bool vs int)
